channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Deep-red Idaho realizes Trump's immigration policy threatens its $20 billion dairy industry
item.description: A Boise State poll of 1,000 Idaho adults shows 85% support a legal pathway for long-term dairy workers, including 79% of Republicans.

item.title: 'Memory supply crisis': Wall Street selloff triggered by fears of chip shortages
item.description: A morning briefing on key market developments and news to start your day.

item.title: Two former governors launch bipartisan coalition to address AI job displacement
item.description: Plus: Fortune's latest news and watercooler conversation topics.

item.title: AI overwhelms our senses—Edward Enninful has an answer for that
item.description: Amid the flood of AI-generated content, the former British Vogue editor bets on a return of physical media.
